switchInput: Switch between crypto and USD input
invalidBtcAddress: Invalid Bitcoin address — must start with 1, 3, or bc1
invalidLtcAddress: Invalid Litecoin address — must start with L, M, 3, or ltc1
invalidDogeAddress: Invalid Dogecoin address — must start with D
invalidDashAddress: Invalid Dash address — must start with X
invalidZecAddress: Invalid Zcash transparent address — must start with t1 or t3. For shielded (u1/zs1), use the Privacy tab.
invalidEvmAddress: Invalid address — must be 0x followed by 40 hex characters
invalidCosmosPrefix: Wrong address prefix for this network
invalidXrpAddress: Invalid XRP address — must start with r
invalidSolanaAddress: Invalid Solana address — must be 32-44 base58 characters
invalidTronAddress: Invalid Tron address — must start with T (34 characters)
invalidZcashShieldedAddress: Invalid Zcash address — must start with u1 (unified), zs1 (Sapling), t1, or t3
